title: Gallimimus Running in Plains Coloring Page
seoTitle: Gallimimus Running in Plains Coloring Page - Free PDF
seoDescription: Speeding Gallimimus sprinting across a prehistoric open plain with cycads. Free PDF.
author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: Gallimimus was an ostrich-like dinosaur that lived during the Late Cretaceous period in what is now Mongolia.
Designed for Medium difficulty, this specific sheet is perfect for practicing intricate color highlighting using wax crayons or markers.
Coloring this drawing is a fantastic way to learn about historical events and cultural legends while developing fine motor coordination.
